title: Avoid accessing class members annotated with '@VisibleForTesting' in production code
description: The '@VisibleForTesting' annotation is used to relax visibility restrictions for easier unit testing. Access to such members should be avoided in production code.
recommendation: Avoid accessing class members annotated with '@VisibleForTesting' in production code
impact: Potential security vulnerabilities and code quality issues

checks.message: Avoid accessing class members annotated with '@VisibleForTesting' in production code
